title: helianthemum nummularium subsp. cantabricum
intro: Helianthemum nummularium subsp. cantabricum, also known as Cantabrian rockrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Cantabrian rockrose include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for colds and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to promote relaxation and ease digestive issues.
